title: 有馬記念の後に・逃げて逃げて逃げた

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yes! ...I won!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The Trickster has returned, I see. And I fell right
into your trap.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You two...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No, I don't think "trick" does it justice. That's
merely a facade.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Sei, you were the best racer on the track today.
That's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... That's some pretty serious praise... Thank
you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I love the way you race, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I get so nervous and excited, and it motivates me
to work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Let's run together again!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: After all, we'll always be peers!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, thank you. It's me, the Grand Prix
champion. ☆

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: I-it's...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Sky?!
Seiun Skyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nya-ha-ha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's right, the one and only! Feels nice to have
an audience calling my name!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I tore your expectations to shreds, huh? ♪ Aah,
what a blast.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Seiun Sky! I always believed in you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations!
That was an amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uhh... Something's off.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
They're acting like the favorite Umamusume won
or something.
choice_data_list: No doubt about it, the crowd loves you.
No doubt about it, the crowd loves you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list: You reeled in the big catch!
You reeled in the big catch!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Plus... we're gonna get an even bigger catch if we
keep at it together, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh... I guess you're right. I shouldn't be surprised at being the favorite after a catch this big.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I don't know... It's kinda embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But I guess that's not such a bad thing, hehe.
